original_image_tags: A single sheet of light gray/blue carbon-copy or onionskin paper. The top right corner contains a faint, multi-line receipt stamp impression. In the middle-right area, there is a faint, illegible handwritten signature or annotation in pencil. The page shows signs of age, with some discoloration and minor tears at the bottom edge, particularly near the bottom-left corner. Two punched holes are visible at the bottom, connected by a horizontal line.

elements.description: A faint blue stamped header at the top right reading 'WRIGHT-PATTERSON FLIGHT SERVICE CENTER / WRIGHT-PATTERSON AIR FORCE BASE, / DAYTON, OHIO'. Below it is a date/time stamp: '1949 JUL 20 13:39'. Faint, mostly illegible typed text is visible through the paper from the reverse side, and there is a horizontal line with two punch holes and partial text 'RECEIVED' at the bottom edge.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a faint stamp/impression at the top right, a faint annotation/signature, a horizontal line with two punch holes at the bottom, and age-related wear; Description B adds specific quoted text ('WRIGHT-PATTERSON FLIGHT SERVICE CENTER', '1949 JUL 20 13:39', 'RECEIVED') that Description A describes as illegible, but they do not contradict each other.
